case_title: DAVID MADDEN VS. ALLIED VAN LINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF TRIAL TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADDEN, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLIED VAN LINES, INC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS GOVERNED BY THE CARMACK AMENDMENT (49 USC SECTION 14706) AS IT ARISES FROM A SHIPMENT IN INTERSTATE COMMERCE REQUIRING CLAIMS OF LOSS OR DAMAGE, INJURY OR DELAY TO BE FILED WITH THE CARRIER WITHIN 90 DAYS OF DELIVERY WHICH PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-03-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLIED VAN LINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DAVID MADDEN AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLYN COULS, LOCAL REGIONAL ADJUSTER FOR ALLIED VAN LINES, INC. NIEL NUTTBROCK, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MADDEN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED VAN LINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, DAVID
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED VAN LINES, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MADDEN, DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIED VAN LINES, INC.
